caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a podcast or radio studio, set within a clothing store. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The man is positioned in front of a microphone, suggesting he is either hosting or participating in a podcast. The background is filled with framed photographs on the wall, adding a personal touch to the setting. To the right, there are mannequins dressed in various outfits, indicating the retail environment. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional setup for a conversation or interview.
